title: facebookresearch/habitat-lab
abstract:
A modular high-level library to train embodied AI agents across a variety of tasks and environments.

> [!WARNING] > **Beyond v0.3.4 this project is no longer receiving official active development or maintenance by Meta internal teams. Please feel free to continue forking and developing the software independently.** [ ](https://codecov.io/gh/facebookresearch/habitat-lab) [ ](https://github.com/facebookresearch/habitat-lab/blob/main/LICENSE) [ ](https://github.com/facebookresearch/habitat-lab/releases/latest) [ ](https://github.com/facebookresearch/habitat-sim) [ ](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/python-390/) [ ](https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit) [ ](https://github.com/psf/black) [ ](https://timothycrosley.github.io/isort/) [ ](https://twitter.com/ai_habitat) Habitat-Lab ============================== Habitat-Lab is a modular high-level library for end-to-end development in embodied AI. It is designed to train agents to perform a wide variety of embodied AI tasks in indoor environments, as well as develop agents that can interact with humans in performing these tasks. Towards this goal, Habitat-Lab is designed to support the following features: - **Flexible task definitions**: allowing users to train agents in a wide variety of single and multi-agent tasks (e.g. navigation, rearrangement, instruction following, question answering, human following), as well as define novel tasks. - **Diverse embodied agents**: configuring and instantiating a diverse set of embodied agents, including commercial robots and humanoids, specifying their sensors and capabilities. - **Training and evaluating agents**: providing algorithms for single and multi-agent training (via imitation or reinforcement learning, or no learning at all as in SensePlanAct pipelines), as well as tools to benchmark their performance on the defined tasks using standard metrics. - **Human in the loop interaction**: providing a framework for humans to interact with the simulator, enabling to collect embodied data or interact with trained agents. Habitat-Lab uses [`Habitat-Sim`](https://github.com
abstract_zh: Habitat-Lab 是一个模块化的高层库，用于在多种任务和环境中训练具身 AI 智能体。它支持灵活的任务定义（如导航、重排、指令跟随、问答、人跟随）、多样化的具身智能体配置（包括商用机器人和人形机器人）、训练与评估算法（模仿学习、强化学习或 SensePlanAct 流水线），以及人机交互框架。该库基于 Habitat-Sim 构建，旨在实现端到端的具身 AI 开发。注意：自 v0.3.4 之后，Meta 内部团队不再进行官方积极开发或维护，但欢迎社区继续 fork 和独立开发。
tldr_zh: Meta 发布的模块化具身 AI 训练库，支持多任务与多智能体。
cover_zh: Meta 开源具身 AI 训练库｜模块化设计让机器人学会导航、指令跟随等任务

judge.reason: 官方具身AI仿真训练框架，支持导航、操作等多任务，高影响力。
